name: Deep Dish Apple Tapioca
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tapioca, salt, molasses, and water in a large bowl. Stir until everything is well mixed.
2. Place the mixture over hot water and cook, stirring frequently, until the tapioca becomes clear.
3. Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Arrange the thinly sliced apples in an oiled baking dish.
5. Add the raisins on top of the apples.
6. Sprinkle sugar, nutmeg, cinnamon, and butter evenly over the mixture.
7. Pour the tapioca mixture over the apples.
8. Bake for 1 hour in the moderate oven (350°F), or until the apples are tender. Serve hot with lemon sauce.
